The simple CUDA implementation is much faster for this spe

vllm.title: [Bugfix][B200] Fix `cutlass_mla` hang
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the hang issue with cutlass_mla when batch size is sufficiently large and kv_splits is high.
The solution is to limit the max kv_splits to 2 when batch size >= 1. We avoid limiting batch_size == 1, since larger kv_splits improve low-latency performance.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix accuracy issue for silu_mul + nvfp4 quant fusion kernel
vllm.author: elvischenv
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Fix accuracy issue for silu_mul + nvfp4 quant fusion kernel

In previous #23671, the original author used an approximate way to compute silu. The sigmoid was computed by tanh(x/2) * 0.5 + 0.5, while the standard definition should be 1 / (1 + e^(-x)).
We didn't observe the accuracy issues pr
